kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Veerapat' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'asdfjkl;123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0,325) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[contains(@class,'w-full')]' by value PASSENGER_ISSUE.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ขับรถแย่มาก ฝ่าไปแดง ขับเร็ว ขับส่ายไปส่ายมา' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending D:\Coding Project\Github Project\Software Engineering\My Branch\sec1_group1_PaiNamNae\image\Thisispdffile.pdf to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"กรุณาเลือกไฟล์รูปหรือวิดีโอเท่านั้น")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: UAT-011 Passenger Upload File Video More than 50MB

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Veerapat' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'asdfjkl;123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0,325) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[contains(@class,'w-full')]' by value PASSENGER_ISSUE.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ขับรถแย่มาก ฝ่าไปแดง ขับเร็ว ขับส่ายไปส่ายมา' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder="รบกวนระบุรายละเอียดเพื่อให้เราตรวจสอบได้รวดเร็วขึ้น..."]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending D:\Coding Project\Github Project\Software Engineering\My Branch\sec1_group1_PaiNamNae\image\5275550-uhd_4096_2160_25fps.mp4 to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"ขนาดไฟล์ต้องไม่เกิน 50MB")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
